theory.canonical_statement: ID5197 records Coupled Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00_Engine\CSV\TZPID_KDP_batches\TZPID_KDP_batch_0007.md` for registry alignment and later derivation.
